query:
SELECT g.id, g.name, g.minSelection, g.maxSelection, g.isRequired, i.name as item_name 
FROM menu_addon_groups g 
JOIN menu_items i ON g.menuItemId = i.id 
WHERE (g.name LIKE '%Varie%' OR g.name LIKE '%Carne%' OR g.name LIKE '%Mix%' OR g.name LIKE '%Prefer%' OR g.name LIKE '%Alterar%')
AND g.minSelection > 0
ORDER BY i.name, g.displayOrder;
